title: Can you connect item levels in the workflows?

posts.author: SSengbush (Scott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I am an Asana Partner who is investigating Monday with a client right now. I am building a workflow for them that scans multiple status fields and then makes a board from a template in another folder. This issue is there ARE 6 STATUS’ and 4 selections each. So there are a lot of combinations that can occur.

My question, since Monday limits automations per minute (something Asana does not do) I have to run a delay every time I pull the info and if the information isn’t uniform the workflow stops.

Can I connect like a regular flow chart to another item like this:

image2395×858 129 KB
